options.content: This translates the spreadsheet idea into live Grafana time series. Productivity is driven by the selected metric variable, defaulting to **Impressions**. Strong, Elite, and Outlier are dynamic P90, P95, and P99 tiers inside the selected time range and Dist filter. `% Base` means percent of active Dists. `% Impressions` means share of captured impressions.

panels.description: Active base, outlier count, outlier percent of base, impression capture, and live percentile thresholds.

targets.rawSql:
WITH
base AS
(
    SELECT
        Dist,
        sum(Requests) AS requests,
        sum(Impressions) AS impressions,
        toFloat64(sum(Impressions)) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate,
        max(hour_bucket) AS last_seen,
        count() AS hours_seen,
        multiIf(
            '${outlier_metric}' = 'WinRate', toFloat64(sum(Impressions)) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0),
            '${outlier_metric}' = 'Requests', toFloat64(sum(Requests)),
            toFloat64(sum(Impressions))
        ) AS metric_value
    FROM default.dist_perf_hourly
    WHERE $__timeFilter(hour_bucket)
      AND match(Dist, '${dist:regex}')
    GROUP BY Dist
    HAVING impressions >= toUInt64(${min_impressions})
),
thresholds AS
(
    SELECT
        quantileExact(0.90)(metric_value) AS p90,
        quantileExact(0.95)(metric_value) AS p95,
        quantileExact(0.99)(metric_value) AS p99
    FROM base
)

SELECT
    count() AS "Active Dists",
    countIf(metric_value >= p99) AS "Outlier Dists",
    round(100.0 * countIf(metric_value >= p99) / nullIf(count(), 0), 2) AS "Outlier % of Base",
    round(100.0 * sumIf(impressions, metric_value >= p99) / nullIf(sum(impressions), 0), 2) AS "Outlier % of Impressions",
    round(any(p90), 2) AS "P90 Strong Threshold",
    round(any(p95), 2) AS "P95 Elite Threshold",
    round(any(p99), 2) AS "P99 Outlier Threshold"
FROM base
CROSS JOIN thresholds

panels.title: Outlier Snapshot

panels.description: Hourly Requests and Impressions for the selected Dist population.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    hour_bucket AS time,
    sum(Requests) AS "Requests",
    sum(Impressions) AS "Impressions"
FROM default.dist_perf_hourly
WHERE $__timeFilter(hour_bucket)
  AND match(Dist, '${dist:regex}')
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Traffic Productivity Over Time

panels.description: Hourly Impressions / Requests across the selected Dist population.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    hour_bucket AS time,
    round(100.0 * sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0), 3) AS "Win Rate %"
FROM default.dist_perf_hourly
WHERE $__timeFilter(hour_bucket)
  AND match(Dist, '${dist:regex}')
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Win Rate Over Time

panels.description: Tracks whether the outlier base is stable, expanding, or collapsing over time.

targets.rawSql:
WITH
hourly AS
(
    SELECT
        hour_bucket,
        Dist,
        sum(Requests) AS requests,
        sum(Impressions) AS impressions,
        toFloat64(sum(Impressions)) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate,
        multiIf(
            '${outlier_metric}' = 'WinRate', toFloat64(sum(Impressions)) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0),
            '${outlier_metric}' = 'Requests', toFloat64(sum(Requests)),
            toFloat64(sum(Impressions))
        ) AS metric_value
    FROM default.dist_perf_hourly
    WHERE $__timeFilter(hour_bucket)
      AND match(Dist, '${dist:regex}')
    GROUP BY hour_bucket, Dist
    HAVING impressions >= toUInt64(${min_impressions})
),
thresholds AS
(
    SELECT
        hour_bucket,
        quantileExact(0.90)(metric_value) AS p90,
        quantileExact(0.95)(metric_value) AS p95,
        quantileExact(0.99)(metric_value) AS p99
    FROM hourly
    GROUP BY hour_bucket
),
scored AS
(
    SELECT h.*, t.p90, t.p95, t.p99
    FROM hourly AS h
    INNER JOIN thresholds AS t USING (hour_bucket)
)
SELECT
    hour_bucket AS time,
    round(100.0 * countIf(metric_value >= p99) / nullIf(count(), 0), 2) AS "Outlier % of Dists",
    round(100.0 * sumIf(impressions, metric_value >= p99) / nullIf(sum(impressions), 0), 2) AS "Outlier % of Impressions",
    countIf(metric_value >= p99) AS "Outlier Dists"
FROM scored
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Outlier Percentage Over Time

panels.description: Spreadsheet-style tier view: how much of the base and impression capture is concentrated in Strong, Elite, and Outlier Dists.

targets.rawSql:
WITH
base AS
(
    SELECT
        Dist,
        sum(Requests) AS requests,
        sum(Impressions) AS impressions,
        toFloat64(sum(Impressions)) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate,
        max(hour_bucket) AS last_seen,
        count() AS hours_seen,
        multiIf(
            '${outlier_metric}' = 'WinRate', toFloat64(sum(Impressions)) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0),
            '${outlier_metric}' = 'Requests', toFloat64(sum(Requests)),
            toFloat64(sum(Impressions))
        ) AS metric_value
    FROM default.dist_perf_hourly
    WHERE $__timeFilter(hour_bucket)
      AND match(Dist, '${dist:regex}')
    GROUP BY Dist
    HAVING impressions >= toUInt64(${min_impressions})
),
thresholds AS
(
    SELECT
        quantileExact(0.90)(metric_value) AS p90,
        quantileExact(0.95)(metric_value) AS p95,
        quantileExact(0.99)(metric_value) AS p99
    FROM base
)
,
scored AS
(
    SELECT
        b.*,
        t.p90,
        t.p95,
        t.p99,
        multiIf(
            b.metric_value >= t.p99, 'Outlier',
            b.metric_value >= t.p95, 'Elite',
            b.metric_value >= t.p90, 'Strong',
            'Base'
        ) AS tier,
        multiIf(
            b.metric_value >= t.p99, 1,
            b.metric_value >= t.p95, 2,
            b.metric_value >= t.p90, 3,
            4
        ) AS tier_sort
    FROM base AS b
    CROSS JOIN thresholds AS t
)
,
grouped AS
(
    SELECT
        tier,
        tier_sort,
        count() AS dists,
        sum(requests) AS requests,
        sum(impressions) AS impressions,
        avg(win_rate) AS avg_win_rate,
        avg(metric_value) AS avg_metric
    FROM scored
    GROUP BY tier, tier_sort
)
SELECT
    tier AS "Tier",
    dists AS "# Dists",
    round(100.0 * dists / nullIf(sum(dists) OVER (), 0), 2) AS "% Base",
    impressions AS "Impressions",
    round(100.0 * impressions / nullIf(sum(impressions) OVER (), 0), 2) AS "% Impressions",
    requests AS "Requests",
    round(100.0 * impressions / nullIf(requests, 0), 3) AS "Win Rate %",
    round(avg_metric, 2) AS "Avg Metric"
FROM grouped
ORDER BY tier_sort

panels.title: Tier Mix and Capture Share

panels.description: Top Dists from the selected period, plotted hourly. Uses Impressions as the time-series value even when the outlier metric is WinRate or Requests.

targets.rawSql:
WITH
base AS
(
    SELECT
        Dist,
        sum(Requests) AS requests,
        sum(Impressions) AS impressions,
        toFloat64(sum(Impressions)) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate,
        max(hour_bucket) AS last_seen,
        count() AS hours_seen,
        multiIf(
            '${outlier_metric}' = 'WinRate', toFloat64(sum(Impressions)) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0),
            '${outlier_metric}' = 'Requests', toFloat64(sum(Requests)),
            toFloat64(sum(Impressions))
        ) AS metric_value
    FROM default.dist_perf_hourly
    WHERE $__timeFilter(hour_bucket)
      AND match(Dist, '${dist:regex}')
    GROUP BY Dist
    HAVING impressions >= toUInt64(${min_impressions})
),
thresholds AS
(
    SELECT
        quantileExact(0.90)(metric_value) AS p90,
        quantileExact(0.95)(metric_value) AS p95,
        quantileExact(0.99)(metric_value) AS p99
    FROM base
)
,
scored AS
(
    SELECT
        b.*,
        t.p90,
        t.p95,
        t.p99,
        multiIf(
            b.metric_value >= t.p99, 'Outlier',
            b.metric_value >= t.p95, 'Elite',
            b.metric_value >= t.p90, 'Strong',
            'Base'
        ) AS tier,
        multiIf(
            b.metric_value >= t.p99, 1,
            b.metric_value >= t.p95, 2,
            b.metric_value >= t.p90, 3,
            4
        ) AS tier_sort
    FROM base AS b
    CROSS JOIN thresholds AS t
)
,
top_dists AS
(
    SELECT Dist
    FROM scored
    WHERE tier IN ('Outlier', 'Elite', 'Strong')
    ORDER BY metric_value DESC
    LIMIT toUInt64(${show_top})
)
SELECT
    hour_bucket AS time,
    Dist AS metric,
    sum(Impressions) AS value
FROM default.dist_perf_hourly
WHERE $__timeFilter(hour_bucket)
  AND Dist IN (SELECT Dist FROM top_dists)
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time, metric

panels.title: Top Productive Dists Over Time

panels.description: Detail table for the high-productivity tier. Z Score shows how far the Dist is from the selected population average.

targets.rawSql:
WITH
base AS
(
    SELECT
        Dist,
        sum(Requests) AS requests,
        sum(Impressions) AS impressions,
        toFloat64(sum(Impressions)) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate,
        max(hour_bucket) AS last_seen,
        count() AS hours_seen,
        multiIf(
            '${outlier_metric}' = 'WinRate', toFloat64(sum(Impressions)) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0),
            '${outlier_metric}' = 'Requests', toFloat64(sum(Requests)),
            toFloat64(sum(Impressions))
        ) AS metric_value
    FROM default.dist_perf_hourly
    WHERE $__timeFilter(hour_bucket)
      AND match(Dist, '${dist:regex}')
    GROUP BY Dist
    HAVING impressions >= toUInt64(${min_impressions})
),
thresholds AS
(
    SELECT
        quantileExact(0.90)(metric_value) AS p90,
        quantileExact(0.95)(metric_value) AS p95,
        quantileExact(0.99)(metric_value) AS p99
    FROM base
)
,
scored AS
(
    SELECT
        b.*,
        t.p90,
        t.p95,
        t.p99,
        multiIf(
            b.metric_value >= t.p99, 'Outlier',
            b.metric_value >= t.p95, 'Elite',
            b.metric_value >= t.p90, 'Strong',
            'Base'
        ) AS tier,
        multiIf(
            b.metric_value >= t.p99, 1,
            b.metric_value >= t.p95, 2,
            b.metric_value >= t.p90, 3,
            4
        ) AS tier_sort
    FROM base AS b
    CROSS JOIN thresholds AS t
)
,
stats AS
(
    SELECT
        sum(impressions) AS total_impressions,
        avg(metric_value) AS avg_metric,
        stddevPop(metric_value) AS sd_metric
    FROM scored
)
SELECT
    Dist,
    tier AS "Tier",
    requests AS "Requests",
    impressions AS "Impressions",
    round(100.0 * win_rate, 3) AS "Win Rate %",
    round(100.0 * impressions / nullIf(total_impressions, 0), 2) AS "% Total Impressions",
    round(metric_value, 2) AS "Metric Value",
    round((metric_value - avg_metric) / nullIf(sd_metric, 0), 2) AS "Z Score",
    hours_seen AS "Hours Seen",
    last_seen AS "Last Seen"
FROM scored
CROSS JOIN stats
WHERE tier IN ('Outlier', 'Elite', 'Strong')
ORDER BY metric_value DESC
LIMIT 500

panels.title: Top Outlier / Elite / Strong Dists

panels.description: Bottom 5% by Win Rate after the minimum-impression gate. This catches Dists that consume opportunity but convert poorly.

targets.rawSql:
WITH
base AS
(
    SELECT
        Dist,
        sum(Requests) AS requests,
        sum(Impressions) AS impressions,
        toFloat64(sum(Impressions)) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate,
        max(hour_bucket) AS last_seen,
        count() AS hours_seen
    FROM default.dist_perf_hourly
    WHERE $__timeFilter(hour_bucket)
      AND match(Dist, '${dist:regex}')
    GROUP BY Dist
    HAVING impressions >= toUInt64(${min_impressions})
),
thresholds AS
(
    SELECT quantileExact(0.05)(win_rate) AS p05_win_rate
    FROM base
)
SELECT
    Dist,
    requests AS "Requests",
    impressions AS "Impressions",
    round(100.0 * win_rate, 3) AS "Win Rate %",
    round(100.0 * any(p05_win_rate), 3) AS "P05 Win Rate %",
    hours_seen AS "Hours Seen",
    last_seen AS "Last Seen"
FROM base
CROSS JOIN thresholds
WHERE win_rate <= p05_win_rate
GROUP BY Dist, requests, impressions, win_rate, hours_seen, last_seen
ORDER BY win_rate ASC, impressions DESC
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Low Productivity Outliers

panels.description: Shows whether outliers cluster during specific hours of day.

targets.rawSql:
WITH
hourly AS
(
    SELECT
        hour_bucket,
        toHour(hour_bucket) AS hod,
        Dist,
        sum(Requests) AS requests,
        sum(Impressions) AS impressions,
        toFloat64(sum(Impressions)) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate,
        multiIf(
            '${outlier_metric}' = 'WinRate', toFloat64(sum(Impressions)) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0),
            '${outlier_metric}' = 'Requests', toFloat64(sum(Requests)),
            toFloat64(sum(Impressions))
        ) AS metric_value
    FROM default.dist_perf_hourly
    WHERE $__timeFilter(hour_bucket)
      AND match(Dist, '${dist:regex}')
    GROUP BY hour_bucket, hod, Dist
    HAVING impressions >= toUInt64(${min_impressions})
),
thresholds AS
(
    SELECT
        hour_bucket,
        quantileExact(0.99)(metric_value) AS p99
    FROM hourly
    GROUP BY hour_bucket
),
scored AS
(
    SELECT h.*, t.p99
    FROM hourly AS h
    INNER JOIN thresholds AS t USING (hour_bucket)
)
SELECT
    hod AS "Hour",
    countIf(metric_value >= p99) AS "Outlier Observations",
    count() AS "Total Observations",
    round(100.0 * countIf(metric_value >= p99) / nullIf(count(), 0), 2) AS "Outlier %"
FROM scored
GROUP BY hod
ORDER BY hod

panels.title: Outlier Concentration by Hour

panels.description: Live P90/P95/P99 cutoffs for the selected metric, time range, Dist filter, and minimum-impression gate.

targets.rawSql:
WITH
base AS
(
    SELECT
        Dist,
        sum(Requests) AS requests,
        sum(Impressions) AS impressions,
        toFloat64(sum(Impressions)) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate,
        max(hour_bucket) AS last_seen,
        count() AS hours_seen,
        multiIf(
            '${outlier_metric}' = 'WinRate', toFloat64(sum(Impressions)) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0),
            '${outlier_metric}' = 'Requests', toFloat64(sum(Requests)),
            toFloat64(sum(Impressions))
        ) AS metric_value
    FROM default.dist_perf_hourly
    WHERE $__timeFilter(hour_bucket)
      AND match(Dist, '${dist:regex}')
    GROUP BY Dist
    HAVING impressions >= toUInt64(${min_impressions})
),
thresholds AS
(
    SELECT
        quantileExact(0.90)(metric_value) AS p90,
        quantileExact(0.95)(metric_value) AS p95,
        quantileExact(0.99)(metric_value) AS p99
    FROM base
)

SELECT
    '${outlier_metric}' AS "Metric",
    round(any(p90), 2) AS "Strong / P90",
    round(any(p95), 2) AS "Elite / P95",
    round(any(p99), 2) AS "Outlier / P99"
FROM base
CROSS JOIN thresholds

panels.title: Current Dynamic Thresholds

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT Dist FROM default.dist_perf_hourly WHERE $__timeFilter(hour_bucket) ORDER BY Dist
list.label: Dist
list.name: dist
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT Dist FROM default.dist_perf_hourly WHERE $__timeFilter(hour_bucket) ORDER BY Dist
